channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Petrol attendant rewarded for kindness uses prize money to settle lobola and support family
item.description: Benson Laka, a petrol attendant in Pretoria, was recognised for his kindness after helping a distressed motorist, Tembeka Sonkwele, sign up for the BP rewards programme. Sonkwele had just lost her job...

item.title: Harambee Starlets adjust plans as 2026 Wafcon rescheduled
item.description: Kenya’s Harambee Starlets have had to scrap their planned two-week training camp in France and will return home after the Confederation of African Football (CAF) postponed the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup ...

item.title: Visa Report Shows Growing Adoption of Digital Wallets and AI in South Africa
item.description: A recent report from Visa South Africa shows that digital wallets are becoming an increasingly popular payment method among South Africans. Nearly 40% of consumers now use digital wallets, highlightin...

item.title: Brumbies reshuffle sees Toby Macpherson step up as Nick Frost waits on sidelines
item.description: The ACT Brumbies are facing a major shake-up ahead of their Super Rugby clash with the Queensland Reds due to injuries and player management protocols. Wingers Corey Toole and Ollie Sapsford are sidel...

item.title: Meghan Markle Takes Full Control of As Ever Brand Following Netflix Partnership
item.description: Meghan Markle has decided to part ways with Netflix and assume complete control of her As Ever brand, which encompasses products such as jams, rosé wine, and flower sprinkles. The Duchess, aged 44, re...

item.title: Medix 5.5 Retinol Body Lotion Gains Praise from Amazon Reviewers for Improving Crepey and Sun-Damaged Skin
item.description: HuffPost highlights the Medix 5.5 Retinol Body Lotion Firming Moisturizer as a popular and affordable option for addressing crepey, sun-damaged, or sagging skin on the body. Priced at around $20 on Am...

item.title: Canadian Jewish Community Advised to Take Precautions Amid International Tensions
item.description: The Jewish Security Network is urging the Jewish community in Greater Toronto to exercise increased caution due to ongoing military tensions between Israel, the United States, and Iran. This advisory ...

item.title: Trump Suggests Cuba Could Be Next Focus After Iran Conflict Ends
item.description: US President Donald Trump don talk about possible next move for America after the current wahala with Iran. This one happen on Thursday for White House when him dey receive Inter Miami CF players and ...

item.title: Sri Lanka evacuates crew of stranded Iranian naval ship on humanitarian grounds
item.description: Sri Lanka is currently in the process of evacuating 208 crew members from the Iranian naval ship IRINS Bushehr, which was stranded near its Exclusive Economic Zone. This comes a day after a U.S. subma...

item.title: Ramon Montenegro Bids Farewell in Batang Quiapo Episode 794
item.description: In the latest episode 794 of the popular Philippine TV series 'Batang Quiapo,' the storyline focuses on the emotional farewell of the character Ramon Montenegro. Played by renowned actors in the serie...

item.title: Senate President Akpabio Commends Senator Osita Ngwu for Awarding Over N250 Million in Scholarships to Enugu West Students
item.description: On Friday, March 6, 2026, the President of the Senate, Godswill Akpabio, joined as Special Guest of Honour at the Osita Ngwu Scholarship and Bursary Awards held in Enugu. He openly commended Senator O...

item.title: Cielo Natividad Shares Her Thoughts on Husband Nikko’s Recent Viral Issue
item.description: Cielo Mae Bautista Eusebio, wife of well-known Filipino celebrity Nikko Natividad, recently spoke up regarding her husband’s viral scandal. In her statement, she emphasized the importance of kindness ...

item.title: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee Protests Electoral Roll Deletions Ahead of Assembly Polls
item.description: On March 6, 2026, West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee started a sit-in protest at the Metro Channel in Kolkata's Esplanade area against the deletion of names in the electoral rolls during the S...

item.title: Massive Fire Hits Residential Area in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City; Task Force Bravo Activated
item.description: A massive fire broke out in a residential area along NIA Road in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City, on the evening of March 6, 2026. The blaze started around 9:01 p.m., initially raised to the first alar...

item.title: BRAC supports Tanzanian women with financial training and loans ahead of International Women’s Day
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, on March 6, 2026, BRAC Finance Limited held a special workshop to encourage Tanzanian women to understand financial literacy before taking any loans. Ms Graceana Rimoy, Deputy of Ope...

item.title: Analysis of the US Sinking of Iranian Warship IRIS Dena and Legal Obligations for Survivor Rescue
item.description: This week, a US submarine torpedoed and sank the Iranian warship IRIS Dena about 40 nautical miles off Sri Lanka, raising concerns about the widening scope of the conflict. While the legality of the U...

item.title: Anand emphasises party discussion and consular support amid Iran conflict
item.description: OTTAWA — Foreign Minister Anita Anand has affirmed that the Liberal Party values a diversity of viewpoints, ahead of a caucus meeting addressing Canada's position on the Iranian conflict. Anand stress...

item.title: Ex-SANDF soldier formally charged with wife’s murder at Westville restaurant
item.description: Fredrik le Roux, a former SANDF special forces operative, has been formally charged with the murder of his wife, Taryn le Roux, at Waxy’s restaurant in Westville last September. Le Roux, 63, is curren...

item.title: Chinese Researchers Develop Eco-Friendly Aqueous Battery with Over 120,000 Cycles Using Tofu-Like Brine Electrolyte
item.description: Researchers from City University of Hong Kong and Southern University of Science and Technology for don develop one new kind of water-based battery wey dey use electrolyte similar to the brine wey dem...

item.title: Amy Wallace discusses posthumous memoir of Virginia Giuffre and the importance of Epstein files
item.description: Amy Wallace, the ghostwriter of Virginia Giuffre’s posthumous memoir 'Nobody’s Girl', reflects on the survivor’s life, legacy, and the publication’s impact. Giuffre, a prominent Epstein accuser, tragi...
